name: awslabs.amazon-qindex-mcp-server
summary: This is an AWS Labs Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation that enables Independent Software Vendors (ISVs) to interact with Amazon Q Business's search capabilities. The server facilitates searching across enterprise customers' Q index using the SearchRelevantContent API.
author: Amazon Web Services
author_email: AWSLabs MCP <203918161+awslabs-mcp@users.noreply.github.com>, Akhilesh Amara <suryaakhileshamara@gmail.com>, Takeshi Kobayashi <tkoba-aws@users.noreply.github.com>
